  • Who I am

If you can imagine it, I can do it.

Hi, I’m Carlos — a Senior Python AI/ML Engineer and Full-Stack Developer with 18+ years of experience architecting scalable data pipelines, deep learning integrations, and intelligent automation systems for geospatial, healthcare, and enterprise environments.

Core Specializations

🧠 Intelligent Systems & Agentic AI

  • LLMs & GenAI: Advanced integration of Large Language Models (Gemini, OpenAI), RAG pipelines, vector databases (Chroma, pgvector), and autonomous AI agent orchestration.
  • Computer Vision & Spatial ML: Custom architectures for geospatial pattern recognition, automated boundary detection, feature extraction, and computer vision classification systems.
  • Advanced Automation: Industrial-grade web scrapers, dynamic filesystem automation scripts, and event-driven data processing layers.

🌐 Geospatial Analytics & Full-Stack Architecture

  • Data Analytics & GIS: Large-scale spatial database management (PostGIS, GeoPandas), coordinate reference transformation pipelines, and deep exploratory data analysis (EDA).
  • High-Performance Frontends: Reactive, state-driven user interfaces built using Angular, React, TypeScript, and RxJS.
  • Robust Backends: Secure, distributed enterprise REST APIs designed with Django, FastAPI, .NET Core, and Java.
Core Capabilities

Production-Grade AI & Spatial Solutions

High-throughput automated workflows, intelligent agentic networks, and spatial data architectures built to eliminate critical operational bottlenecks.

neurology Intelligent Systems

Autonomous RFP & Bid Ingestion

Multi-Format RAG & stateful multi-agent systems designed to process complex tender files, audit contractual compliance, and map requirement metrics in under 5 minutes.

View Solution Framework →
map Spatial Intelligence

Geospatial Land Valuation Engines

Isolating granular geographic land value premiums using advanced Support Vector Regression (SVR) and structured PostGIS layers to accelerate underwriting accuracy.

View Solution Framework →
database Data Engineering

High-Volume GIS Pipeline Tuning

Refactoring bottlenecked database layers into highly scalable, parallelized spatial ETL processing streams. Drops cloud compute costs and latency significantly.

View Solution Framework →

Featured Case Studies

  • Geospatial Automated Valuation: Optimizing Calgary Land Surface Mapping via SVR June 2026 — A business case and machine learning framework for isolating pure geographic land value premiums in residential real estate.

  • Case Study: The Bid Requirements Pipeline June 2026 — Architecting a Multi-Format RAG & Stateful Multi-Agent System for Enterprise Ingestion

  • Case Study: Rapid Technical Pivot to Enterprise Backend Architecture June 2026 — Technical analysis outlining AI integration, data architecture engineering, and performance outcomes.

  • Case Study: Optimizing High-Volume GIS & Geospatial Data Pipelines June 2026 — Technical analysis outlining AI integration, data architecture engineering, and performance outcomes.
